steps.title: Use resistance to a toll increase
steps.content: The sentence says no amount of justification is likely to persuade some drivers about raising the toll. That makes sense if they believe the current toll is already much too high.

steps.title: Choose the excessive-cost word
steps.content: A means likely to cause disagreement, B means unclear, and D means justified. The matching word means unreasonably or excessively high, which explains why those drivers would resist any increase. The answer is C.
